sentences.target: On construit une cabane derrière la maison.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ kɔ̃stʁɥi yn ka.ban dɛʁjɛʁ la mɛzɔ̃/

translations.fr: On construit une cabane derrière la maison.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ kɔ̃stʁɥi yn ka.ban dɛʁjɛʁ la mɛzɔ̃/
translations.en: We’re building a cabin behind the house.
translations.es: Estamos construyendo una cabaña detrás de la casa.
translations.de: Wir bauen hinter dem Haus eine Hütte.
translations.it: Stiamo costruendo una capanna dietro casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在房子后面建一间小木屋。
translations.yue: 我哋喺屋後面起緊間小木屋。
translations.pt: Estamos construindo uma cabana atrás da casa.
translations.tr: Evin arkasında bir kulübe inşa ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xây một căn lều phía sau nhà.
translations.nl: We bouwen een hut achter het huis.
translations.hu: Egy kunyhót építünk a ház mögött.
translations.hi: हम घर के पीछे एक झोंपड़ी बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Χτίζουμε μια καλύβα πίσω από το σπίτι.
translations.nb: Vi bygger en hytte bak huset.
translations.id: Kami sedang membangun sebuah pondok di belakang rumah.
translations.sv: Vi bygger en stuga bakom huset.
translations.ro: Construim o colibă în spatele casei.
translations.da: Vi bygger en hytte bag huset.
translations.ja: 家の裏で小屋を作っています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular, often used for 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cabane'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'construit'.
Preposition introducing a location complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'maison'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'derrière'.

sentences.target: Tu viens voir ma cabane dans le jardin.
sentences.reading: /ty vjɛ̃ vwaʁ ma ka.ban dɑ̃ lə ʒaʁdɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu viens voir ma cabane dans le jardin.
translations.ipa: /ty vjɛ̃ vwaʁ ma ka.ban dɑ̃ lə ʒaʁdɛ̃/
translations.en: Will you come see my hut in the garden?
translations.es: Ven a ver mi cabaña en el jardín.
translations.de: Komm und sieh dir meine Hütte im Garten an.
translations.it: Vieni a vedere la mia capanna in giardino.
translations.ko: 정원에 있는 내 오두막을 보러 와.
translations.zh-Hans: 来看看我花园里的小木屋。
translations.yue: 嚟睇吓我花園入面嗰間小木屋。
translations.ru: Приходи посмотреть мою хижину в саду.
translations.pt: Vem ver a minha cabana no jardim.
translations.he: בוא לראות את הבקתה שלי בגינה.
translations.vi: Đến xem căn lều của tôi trong vườn.
translations.nl: Kom mijn hut in de tuin bekijken.
translations.uk: Прийди подивитися мою хатинку в саду.
translations.hu: Gyere megnézni a kunyhómat a kertben.
translations.hi: बगीचे में मेरी झोंपड़ी देखने आओ.
translations.pl: Przyjdź zobaczyć moją chatkę w ogrodzie.
translations.el: Έλα να δεις την καλύβα μου στον κήπο.
translations.nb: Kom og se hytta mi i hagen.
translations.sv: Kom och titta på min stuga i trädgården.
translations.ro: Vino să vezi coliba mea în grădină.
translations.cs: Přijď se podívat na mou chatu na zahradě.
translations.da: Kom og se min hytte i haven.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'viens' expressing the action/purpose.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'cabane'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'voir'.
Preposition introducing a location phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'jardin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Mes cousins ont une cabane dans les arbres.
sentences.reading: /me kuzɛ̃ ɔ̃ yn ka.ban dɑ̃ le zaʁbʁ/

translations.fr: Mes cousins ont une cabane dans les arbres.
translations.ipa: /me kuzɛ̃ ɔ̃ yn ka.ban dɑ̃ le zaʁbʁ/
translations.es: Mis primos tienen una casa en el árbol.
translations.it: I miei cugini hanno una casa sull'albero.
translations.ko: 내 사촌들은 나무 위에 있는 나무집이 있어요.
translations.ru: У моих кузенов есть домик на дереве.
translations.pt: Meus primos têm uma casa na árvore.
translations.he: לבני הדודים שלי יש בית על העץ.
translations.vi: Các anh chị em họ của tôi có một nhà trên cây.
translations.nl: Mijn neven en nichten hebben een boomhut.
translations.uk: У моїх двоюрідних братів і сестер є будиночок на дереві.
translations.hi: मेरे चचेरे भाई‑बहनों के पास पेड़ पर बना एक घर है.
translations.pl: Moi kuzyni mają domek na drzewie.
translations.el: Τα ξαδέρφια μου έχουν ένα δενδρόσπιτο.
translations.ro: Verișorii mei au o căsuță în copac.
translations.cs: Moji bratranci a sestřenice mají domek na stromě.
translations.da: Mine fætre og kusiner har en træhytte.
translations.ja: 私のいとこたちはツリーハウスを持っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, plural form; modifies 'cousins'.
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of 'ont'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; lexical 'have'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cabane'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'ont'.
Preposition introducing a location phrase.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'arbres'.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On dort dans la cabane ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dɔʁ dɑ̃ la ka.ban sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On dort dans la cabane ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dɔʁ dɑ̃ la ka.ban sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We’re sleeping in the cabin tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche dormimos en la cabaña.
translations.de: Wir schlafen heute Nacht in der Hütte.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今晚在小木屋里睡觉。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚喺小木屋入面瞓覺。
translations.ru: Сегодня ночью мы спим в хижине.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos dormir na cabana.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi ngủ trong căn lều.
translations.nl: Vanavond slapen we in de hut.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вночі ми спимо в хатинці.
translations.hi: आज रात हम झोंपड़ी में सो रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dziś w nocy śpimy w chatce.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ κοιμόμαστε στην καλύβα.
translations.nb: I natt sover vi i hytta.
translations.id: Malam ini kami tidur di dalam pondok.
translations.sv: I natt sover vi i stugan.
translations.ro: În noaptea asta dormim în colibă.
translations.cs: Dnes v noci spíme v chatě.
translations.da: I nat sover vi i hytten.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Preposition introducing a location phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cabane'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; part of the time NP 'ce soir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; time expression functioning adverbially.
